subject: docs(claude): add HTTPS Proxy Support suggested implementation
body:
Add zero-dependency HTTP CONNECT tunnel pattern for Node.js scripts
that need to reach external APIs through an HTTPS proxy, solving the
problem that Node's built-in fetch() and https.get() don't respect
HTTP_PROXY/HTTPS_PROXY environment variables.

Tags: documentation, infrastructure, proxy
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: developer-experience
Semver: patch

https://claude.ai/code/session_01WZHfXqEduL6Y7kFYbavGqw
